title: DN8 5JT, CP Energy Centre Ltd: environmental permit issued – EPR/RP3727SJ/A001
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: CP Energy Centre Ltd   Installation name: CP Energy Centre   Permit number: EPR/RP3727SJ/A001   "
